text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I guess it was impossible for you too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please don't let it bother you! It's all the puny
claw's fault!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you could put me in there instead of that claw,
I'd scoop out every last adorable plushie!
